title: WOS Studio (Authoring) — Binding (polymorphic)
description: Polymorphic Studio Binding schema covering ServiceBinding, EventBinding, PolicyEngineBinding, and DMNImport per studio/specs/binding-and-integration.md. Discriminated by `kind`. The first three project to `$.integration.bindings[*]` of the compiled `$wosWorkflow`; DMNImport is one-way import only (transpiles DMN tables to internal Studio DecisionTable PolicyObjects via FEEL→FEL transpilation; no DMN export). Carries `exercisedByScenarios[]` so every binding declares its contract test (per binding-and-integration.md SA-MUST-bind-070-073).
$comment: Promotion status (Stage-3, 2026-05-01): MVP shape; per-kind body shape is illustrative-and-flexible.

x-lm.intent: Document type marker for Studio Binding objects
Binding kind discriminator — load-bearing for projection routing

items.description: Either a SourceCitation/AuthoringProvenanceRecord reference (string id) OR a full inlined AuthoringProvenanceRecord object validated against wos-studio-provenance.schema.json#/$defs/AuthoringProvenanceRecord (G2 fix: was previously [string, object] with no shape constraint, so embedded records bypassed the per-record validation contract).

exercisedByScenarios.description: Scenario refs that exercise this binding as its contract test (per SA-MUST-bind-070-073). Every binding MUST declare at least one Scenario ref before it can advance to lifecycleState='approved' (lint-pending).

body.description: Kind-specific body. The `allOf` clauses below enforce required fields per `kind`. Body remains `additionalProperties: true` so authors may extend per-kind shapes; Stage-4 lint rules layer deeper validation (URI resolution, OpenAPI operation existence, etc.).
ServiceBinding body. Required: operationKind ('openapi' | 'arazzo' | 'custom'). Recommended: apiSpecRef, operationRef, inputBindings[] (caseFile→request), outputBindings[] (response→caseFile).
EventBinding body. Required: eventName, direction ('consume' | 'emit'), cloudEventsExtensions.{woscausationeventid, woscorrelationkey} per binding-and-integration.md SA-MUST-bind-020.

cloudEventsExtensions.description: Per SA-MUST-bind-020: woscausationeventid + woscorrelationkey are not optional — WOS uses them for case correlation.

body.description: PolicyEngineBinding body. Required: engineKind ('opa' | 'cedar' | 'xacml' | 'custom'). Recommended: endpoint, decisionMapping {permit/deny}, reasonsMapping, obligationsMapping. Composes restrictively (engine deny overrides Studio permits). Per SA-MUST-bind-031, `composition` MUST be `deny-overrides` when present (the only allowed value in v1).

composition.description: SA-MUST-bind-031: composition mode for engine decisions. Only `deny-overrides` is admitted in v1; other modes deferred.

body.description: DMNImport body. Required: sourceDecisionId (the DMN <decision id="..."> being imported). Recommended: sourceDmnUri OR dmnXml (one of), feelToFelMapping {transpilerVersion, transpiledAt, issues[]}, producedDecisionTableRef. One-way import only (per parent CLAUDE.md DMN rejection).
